title: USGS earthquakes snapshot
description: Contract for data/realtime/usgs_earthquakes/latest.json — global M4.5+ earthquakes from the USGS GeoJSON feed (4.5_day.geojson).

generated_at_iso.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp (Z-suffixed) when the snapshot was written. Stamped by scrapers/lib/storage.py:write_latest_snapshot().

magnitude.description: Moment magnitude — physically bounded [0, ~10]. Feed filters to M4.5+ but schema does not enforce the floor to stay compatible if the feed URL changes.

origin_time_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the earthquake origin time, or empty string when the USGS epoch_ms field is absent.

depth_km.description: Hypocentre depth — bounded by deepest recorded subduction events (~750 km).

place.description: Human-readable location description from USGS (may be empty for remote ocean events).

tsunami.description: USGS tsunami flag: 0 = no warning issued, 1 = tsunami warning issued.

significance.description: USGS 'sig' score — higher = more newsworthy. No defined upper bound; observed values are 300-1500.
